title: xolantha commutata
intro: Xolantha commutata, also known as the yellow bird's tongue or yellow bird tongue, is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It is a perennial herb native to South America, known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including wounds, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. Xolantha commutata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and its health benefits include reducing pain and swelling, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system.
